title: Loongson Platform Stack
body:
# Loongson Platform Stack

**Platform stack:** `pc_loongson` · **Era:** 2002–2026 · **Vendor:** Loongson · **Count:** 7

MIPS (**2K, 2002**) through LoongArch **3A5000 (2020)** and **7A1000 bridge** — sovereign Chinese CPU with IOMMU, LPC, and PCIe root.

## Stack doctrine

This page lists every combinatorics leaf stamped `platform_stack: pc_loongson` plus companion dies emitted from `field-cpu-companion-seed.json`. Host and guest CPUs matching the stack's `match` rules receive `always_with` linkage at combinatorics build — no manual wiring.

## Manufacturing notes — companion dies

- **Loongson 7A1000 Bridge** (Loongson, 64-bit) — 7A northbridge — PCIe3 SATA USB — 3A5000 pairing
- **Loongson 3A DDR MC** (Loongson, 64-bit) — On-die/off-chip DDR4 memory controller — 3A series
- **Loongson 2K1000 SoC Hub** (Loongson, 64-bit) — 2K embedded south — GMAC SATA USB LPC
- **Loongson IOMMU** (Loongson, 64-bit) — DMA address translation — LoongArch platform IOMMU
- **Loongson LPC Controller** (Loongson, 64-bit) — LPC bus — Super I/O and legacy ISA path
- **Loongson PCIe Root Complex** (Loongson, 64-bit) — PCIe root ports — 7A/3A platform expansion
- **Loongson CPUCFG Glue** (Loongson, 64-bit) — CPUCFG feature regs — LA464/LA664 always-with

## Catalog ids

The `chip_ids` array holds all **7** entries for this platform stack, sorted alphabetically. Run `field-ironclad-chips-combinatorics.py combinatronic` for path percents and imprint renders.

*Stack: pc_loongson · seed: data/field-cpu-companion-seed.json · citation: ironclad:chips:3*
